Package com.gpudb.filesystem.download

Class MultiPartDownloadInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.gpudb.filesystem.download.MultiPartDownloadInfo
  • public class MultiPartDownloadInfo
extends Object
    This is an internal class and not meant to be used by the end users of the filesystem API. The consequences of using this class directly in client code is not guaranteed and maybe undesirable. This class packages and mimics certain important attributes of a multi-part download operation. The attributes of this class are in one-one correspondence to those specified in the GPUdb.downloadFiles(List, List, List, Map) endpoint.
